subject: refactor(ui): consolidate cell grid components, reorder Structure sections
body:
Replaced ContextBar's inline CellGrid with MiniCellGrid (new 'contextbar'
size variant), eliminating ~80 lines of duplicated cell grid logic. Moved
Pages section before Grid in the Structure tab and collapsed it by default
since most users work with single-page designs.

Tags: ui, refactor, structure, components

Impact: internal
